title: Squirrel Removal in Travis, Staten Island | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Travis, Staten Island. Humane extraction, attic cleanup & prevention. Licensed experts. $900-$2,500. Call today for fast service!
intro: Squirrels in Travis, Staten Island can cause serious damage to your home's attic, soffits, and insulation, particularly in the residential neighborhoods near the William T. Davis Wildlife Refuge. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Travis, from exclusion and trapping to full attic restoration. Our licensed technicians understand the unique wildlife challenges facing this western Staten Island community.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Travis homeowners for years with humane, effective squirrel removal that prioritizes long-term prevention over quick fixes. Our technicians are fully licensed, insured, and trained in the latest exclusion techniques to keep squirrels out permanently while respecting Travis's natural surroundings.
localContext: Travis's proximity to the William T. Davis Wildlife Refuge and Victory Boulevard's wooded areas means squirrel activity is common, especially in the single-family homes and ranch-style properties that dominate the neighborhood. The area's mature trees and spacious yards create ideal conditions for squirrels seeking shelter in attics and crawl spaces during colder months.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Travis, Staten Island?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Travis typically costs between $900 and $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes inspection, humane trapping, exclusion work, and prevention measures. Attic cleanup and insulation replacement may increase the total cost.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have squirrels in my Travis home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in your attic during early morning or evening hours, chewed soffits or fascia boards, visible holes near your roofline, and droppings in your attic space. You may also notice squirrels entering or exiting your roof around dawn or dusk.

faqs.question: Are squirrel removal services in Travis humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, Best Pest Control NYC uses only humane removal methods that comply with New York State wildlife regulations. We use live traps and one-way exclusion devices that allow squirrels to exit but not re-enter. We never use poisons or methods that cause unnecessary suffering.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Travis property?
faqs.answer: We typically arrive for an inspection within 24-48 hours of your call. Most squirrel removal projects in Travis are completed within 3-7 days, though timelines vary based on the number of squirrels and entry points. We prioritize emergency situations where squirrels have caused significant damage or pose immediate risks.
